visual_findings: Generated drawing reaches the reference DisplayDim floor, but dimension placement is concentrated and visually overdense around the main/projection view area.
Generated view composition does not match the cleaner reference drafting style; the main and projected views are harder to read at the selected scale and placement.
Notes and titlebar text are present as small note blocks, but they do not match the reference titlebar/notes layout and are not visually acceptable for release.
API/reference-style pass evidence is supporting only; the application UI screenshot remains the final visual gate.
cases.required_next_action: Adjust dimension grouping/placement and learned notes/titlebar layout, regenerate LB26001-A-04-006, then rerun application UI screenshot review.

acceptance_rule: A drawing is not accepted until the application Drawing Review UI screenshot is visually judged PASS against the same-name reference drawing.
